ast.name: appendText
ast.source: There is no password recovery. If you forget a password, the encrypted note cannot be decrypted. Keep backups of important notes.
ast.target: 密码无法找回。如果忘记密码，加密的笔记将无法解密。请备份重要笔记。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Cancel
ast.target: 取消

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-encrypt a note as soon as you navigate away from it. Strongly recommended — while a note is unlocked its plaintext is written to disk.
ast.target: 离开笔记后立即重新加密。强烈建议——笔记解锁时，其明文内容会写入磁盘。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minutes a note may stay unlocked before it is re-encrypted. 0 disables the timer.
ast.target: 笔记保持解锁状态的分钟数，之后将被重新加密。设为0可禁用计时器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minutes the vault password stays cached in memory. After this you'll be asked again on the next unlock. 0 keeps it until Obsidian quits.
ast.target: 保险库密码在内存中缓存的分钟数。超时后，下次解锁时将再次要求输入。设为0可保持缓存直至Obsidian退出。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: PBKDF2 iterations used when locking new notes. Higher is slower but more resistant to brute force. Existing locked notes keep the value they were locked with.
ast.target: 锁定新笔记时使用的PBKDF2迭代次数。数值越高，速度越慢，但抗暴力破解能力越强。已锁定的笔记将保留其锁定时的迭代次数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: After encrypting, decrypt the result and confirm it matches the original before replacing the note. Strongly recommended — prevents a faulty lock from destroying content. Roughly doubles lock time.
ast.target: 加密后，解密结果并与原文确认匹配，然后再替换笔记。强烈建议——防止因锁定错误导致内容损坏。锁定时间大约会增加一倍。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: open a note first.
ast.target: Lockbox：请先打开一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: operation failed. See console for details.
ast.target: Lockbox：操作失败。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: that note is already locked.
ast.target: Lockbox：该笔记已被锁定。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: encryption self-check failed — note left unlocked to avoid data loss.
ast.target: Lockbox：加密自检失败——为避免数据丢失，笔记保持解锁状态。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: failed to lock note. See console for details.
ast.target: Lockbox：锁定笔记失败。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: that note is busy — try again in a moment.
ast.target: Lockbox：该笔记正在处理中——请稍后再试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: that note isn't locked.
ast.target: Lockbox：该笔记未锁定。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: incorrect password.
ast.target: Lockbox：密码错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: failed to unlock note. See console for details.
ast.target: Lockbox：解锁笔记失败。详情请查看控制台。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: a bulk operation is in progress.
ast.target: Lockbox：批量操作正在进行中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: no unlocked notes to lock here.
ast.target: Lockbox：此处没有可锁定的已解锁笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: cancelled — no notes were changed.
ast.target: Lockbox：已取消——未更改任何笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Lockbox: forgot the cached vault password.
ast.target: Lockbox：已忘记缓存的保险库密码。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This note used its own password, which can't be recovered after a crash. Set a NEW password to re-encrypt it (or cancel to leave it for now).
ast.target: 此笔记使用了其自身的密码，崩溃后无法恢复。请设置一个新密码以重新加密它（或取消以暂时保留）。
